name: tradingview-reader
description: > Read TradingView desktop app for market data, news, alerts, watchlists, and screener results using opencli (read-only). Use this skill whenever the user wants quotes, options chains, options expiries, screener results across stocks/crypto/forex/futures/bonds, gainers/losers/movers, news headlines or full story bodies, alerts (active list, fire log, offline fires), watchlists including colored flag lists, symbol search/autocomplete, chart state, or screenshots from their local TradingView.app.
author: himself65
summary_zh: 这是一个通过命令行只读访问TradingView桌面端的工具，能让你直接在终端获取行情、新闻、警报和选股结果等数据，适合想在终端环境下快速盯盘查盘的交易者。
